name: node-wrap-ansi
title: node-wrap-ansi
summary: Wordwrap a string with ANSI escape codes
description:
Wordwrap a string with ANSI escape codes
Node.js module to wrap words of a string to the specified column
width, taking into account the actual visual width of the contained
unicode characters.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-wrap-ansi because Wordwrap a string with ANSI escape codes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-wrap-ansi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-wrap-ansi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-wrap-ansi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
